Frequently asked questions

Here are the questions that people often ask about apkmabbu. If you need more information, browse our pages and categories to learn more about the project.

What is apkmabbu?

apkmabbu is an open playground for lovers of Android games & apps.

At apkmabbu, you can easily search and download thousands of MOD APK, Premium APK and Original APK games and apps for free. Use the search button to find what you’re looking for, or browse the pre-designed categories.

Is apkmabbu safe?

SURE!

APKMabbu always uses the original APK from Google Play as the foundation for the birth of quality MOD versions. We even turn off unnecessary app permissions to optimize battery life and your privacy.

DON’T WORRY if security apps on Android give warnings. The reason is only because the signature of the MOD version has been changed compared to the original.

How does apkmabbu work?

apkmabbu compiles and publishes the best games and apps based on trends and requests from users.

You can then browse through the games and apps catalog to find the ones that suit your needs.

apkmabbu takes feedback from you and other lovely users to continue to upgrade, improve the playing field as well as the quality of MOD versions posted in the future.

What makes apkmabbu different from other websites?

Free, simple and mindful.

Does apkmabbu charge a fee?

NO.

apkmabbu is completely free and always will be. We will try to maintain the project for as long as I can. If you love this project and want to be a part of it, we’d love to get your support.

How to use apkmabbu?

You browse this website, search for your favorites and then download them. It’s all simple.

A P K M O D Y

An Android App Store where you can download your favorite Premium / MOD / APK apps.
